violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The mat under the egg cooker needs to be cleaned. The drip pan for the sauce bottles on the cook line should be cleaned more frequently. The ledge behind the chicken holding cabinet above the fry station needs to be cleaned. The top of the reach in cooler by the food transfer bin needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the three compartment sink and shelf by the sink needs to be cleaned better. The floor in the walk in freezer needs to be cleaned.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The bottom of the small cooler for breakfast items had sausage temped at 73.4. Air temp was 66.7 degrees. This unit was not working. Food from the bottom was discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The outside of the small breakfast cooler needs to be cleaned. The outside and behind the holding cabinet on top of the fry station needs to be cleaned.
